testcase.name: 2: xcrun simctl shutdown iPhone\ 11\ Pro\ Max; xcrun simctl erase iPhone\ 11\ Pro\ Max; xcrun simctl boot iPhone\ 11\ Pro\ Max; xcrun simctl bootstatus iPhone\ 11\ Pro\ Max -b

3: OPENCLIENT_SCREENSHOT_OUTPUT_DIR=/Users/mininic/XCodeProjects/opencode-ios-client/fastlane/screenshots xcodebuild test -project /Users/mininic/XCodeProjects/opencode-ios-client/OpenCodeIOSClient.xcodeproj -scheme OpenCodeIOSClientScreenshots -destination platform\=iOS\ Simulator,name\=iPhone\ 11\ Pro\ Max,OS\=26.2 -only-testing:OpenCodeIOSClientUITests/OpenCodeIOSClientUITests/testAppStoreScreenshots -parallel-testing-enabled NO -maximum-concurrent-test-simulator-destinations 1 -derivedDataPath /Users/mininic/XCodeProjects/opencode-ios-client/.derived-data-screenshots
4: xcrun simctl shutdown iPad\ Pro\ 13-inch\ \(M5\); xcrun simctl erase iPad\ Pro\ 13-inch\ \(M5\); xcrun simctl boot iPad\ Pro\ 13-inch\ \(M5\); xcrun simctl bootstatus iPad\ Pro\ 13-inch\ \(M5\) -b

5: OPENCLIENT_SCREENSHOT_OUTPUT_DIR=/Users/mininic/XCodeProjects/opencode-ios-client/fastlane/screenshots xcodebuild test -project /Users/mininic/XCodeProjects/opencode-ios-client/OpenCodeIOSClient.xcodeproj -scheme OpenCodeIOSClientScreenshots -destination platform\=iOS\ Simulator,name\=iPad\ Pro\ 13-inch\ \(M5\),OS\=26.2 -only-testing:OpenCodeIOSClientUITests/OpenCodeIOSClientUITests/testAppStoreScreenshots -parallel-testing-enabled NO -maximum-concurrent-test-simulator-destinations 1 -derivedDataPath /Users/mininic/XCodeProjects/opencode-ios-client/.derived-data-screenshots
